title: Implement SIWE frontend flow (nonce → sign → verify)
description: After the user connects their wallet via Web3Modal, automatically initiate the SIWE flow: fetch a nonce, ask the wallet to sign the message, send to siwe-verify, and navigate to the returned action link.
acceptance_criteria: On wallet connection event, the SIWE flow starts automatically (no extra button click)
Prompts user to sign the returned message via their connected wallet
Calls POST /functions/v1/siwe-verify with { message, signature, address }
On success: navigates to the returned action_link URL (which goes to /auth/callback)
On user rejection of signature: shows 'Signature cancelled' message, does not redirect
On server error: shows 'Sign-in failed, please try again'

steps.details:
import { watchAccount } from 'https://esm.sh/wagmi@1';
watchAccount(async (account) => { if (account.status === 'connected' && account.address) { await startSiweFlow(account.address); } });

technical_notes: The action_link returned from siwe-verify is a Supabase magic link URL. Navigating to it causes Supabase to fire onAuthStateChange on /auth/callback, completing the session establishment.
